nasb.text: The Lord said, “I will bring them back from Bashan. I will bring them back from the depths of the sea;

esv.text: The Lord said, “I will bring them back from Bashan, I will bring them back from the depths of the sea,

cnv.text: 主說：“我必使他們從巴珊回來， 使他們從海的深處回來；

ccb.text: 主说： “我要把他们从巴珊带回来， 从深海带回来，

csbs.text: 主说：“我将使子民从巴珊回来， 从海洋的深处回来，
